page.text:
Mathlore is an open, collaborative, hand-crafted collection of mathematical
knowledge encoded in the [Mathlingua](https://www.mathlingua.org) language.

All contributions, questions, comments, and feedback are greatly appreciated
and can be sent to DominicKramer@gmail.com.

To get started, use the menu in the top-left corner of the page to navigate
through the collection.
